---
id: delete-scheduler
title: 'Delete scheduler'
description: "Removes a scheduler. This action can't be done when a scheduler is active, only when it's pending or terminated"
sidebar_label: 'Delete scheduler'
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: 'delete api-method'
info_path: theolive/api/schedulers/schedulers
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading as={'h1'} className={'openapi__heading'} children={'Delete scheduler'}></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint method={'delete'} path={'/{id}'} context={'endpoint'}></MethodEndpoint>

Removes a scheduler. This action can't be done when a scheduler is active, only when it's pending or terminated

<Heading id={'request'} as={'h2'} className={'openapi-tabs__heading'} children={'Request'}></Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{ name: 'id', in: 'path', description: 'The ID of a scheduler', schema: { type: 'string' }, required: true }]}
></ParamsDetails>
